benefits.description: Able to eat again without throwing up; recovered ability to maintain food intake
Beginning to gain back weight after extended period of weight loss

protocol_notes: User reports 20 years of peptide experience dating back to 2006 when CJC came out. Had extensive stomach damage causing daily vomiting. Initial protocol: BPC-157 1mg daily for months (minimal effect). Escalated to: BPC-157 1mg 3x daily—gained ability to eat without vomiting but plateau with minimal food intake. Further escalated to: BPC-157 3mg morning, 3mg noon, 4mg night (total 10mg daily) with arginine 3g orally daily. Describes this as a 'hail mary' approach due to severity of condition. Explicitly states: 'I would not recommend anyone else doing that' but was previously suicidal. User is experienced and claims educated use, not a beginner.
